jiraNote: Jira MCP session expired — restart the user-jira-ghe MCP server to restore live Jira data. Action items and customer issues shown below are carried forward from the previous run.

customerIssues.summary: Prevent stuck inbox items for purged candidates in ready for hire
customerIssues.tldrSummary: ASML hit a job application with a pending Employment Agreement Review Documents inbox item assigned to candidate-as-self; the job application was purged in Ready for Hire / Staffing Event Completed and the task can no longer be actioned. Need to fix the purge logic in Ready for Hire to prevent additional stuck inbox items.

diagnosis.reasoning: Known purge-logic issue: even with Default Disposition when Candidate is Purged enabled, Ready for Hire stage can complete the purge before dispositioning, leaving orphaned candidate-as-self tasks. Multiple prior fixes indicate Workday recognises this as a product defect.

customerIssues.summary: [To Fix] Skills and Automatic Activity Stream Comments Remaining After Job Application Purge
customerIssues.tldrSummary: PwC running Job Application purge with all PDTs except Link Between Person and the Job Application; automatic activity-stream system comments and Skills are not being purged. Triage proposes updating the Comments and Notifications PDT to include Event Record data plus a new IOP method to traverse to Candidate Skill Item.

diagnosis.reasoning: Customer intentionally excluded the Link Between Person and Job Application PDT, which preserves the candidate-application connection by design. Skills and system comments tied to that link are correctly retained. The triage proposal to enrich the PDT confirms the current behaviour is the designed state.

customerIssues.summary: Purged Job Application keeps an unassigned task when the awaiting task has been reassigned
customerIssues.tldrSummary: Reopened on 1 Apr after Purge Plans (HRREC-88211) was reverted from Production due to a regression. Airbus's Preview testing was successful pre-revert; they are awaiting Purge Plans reaching Prod again to confirm fix. Targeted re-deploy: 22 May Preview.

diagnosis.reasoning: HRREC-84365 fix did not cover the reassigned-task scenario; reassigned awaiting tasks persist as unassigned after purge. Workaround exists (exclude Events Awaiting Action PDT) but Workday is delivering the proper fix via Purge Plans. The chain of related fixes confirms it is a recognised defect.

competitorNews.title: Greenhouse launches Hire Link for Workday® — native out-of-the-box onboarding integration
bullets: Hire Link for Workday® automatically exports new hire data from Greenhouse to create pre-hire profiles and trigger onboarding in Workday, eliminating manual data transfer.
Covers new hires, rehires, and internal transfers — closing the candidate-to-onboarding lifecycle gap that previously required costly custom integration work.
Positions Greenhouse as a plug-and-play front-end ATS that sits on top of Workday HCM, targeting customers who want best-of-breed recruiting without a full Workday Recruiting rollout.
March 2026 release also includes improved duplicate detection (email/phone/LinkedIn vs. name matching), multi-calendar interview scheduling view, and MyGreenhouse Stages for candidate transparency.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Greenhouse now competes directly at the ATS layer with a Workday HCM integration play — defend by emphasising native Recruiting + HCM unification and total cost of ownership.

competitorNews.title: SmartRecruiters announces 'Future of Hiring' with fully agentic Winston AI suite
bullets: Winston Interview: autonomous first-round screening agent that conducts voice-led interviews at scale with consistent, reviewable candidate-scored answers.
Winston Chat: embeds AI-powered assessments and job-specific Q&As into candidate conversations, claiming 66% application completion rates.
Winston Companion: contextual Q&A for recruiters and hiring managers about jobs, pipelines, and process — a recruiter co-pilot surface.
Winston Match enhanced with sub-scores for education, skills, and experience; agentic CRM activates talent pools via email, SMS, and WhatsApp.
Claims 75% reduction in time-to-decision and candidates recommended by Winston are 100% more likely to be selected for interviews.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SmartRecruiters' full-agent play mirrors HiredScore's promise — differentiate on HCM-native data depth, compliance guardrails, and enterprise governance that a standalone agent layer cannot match.

competitorNews.title: SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2026: SmartRecruiters Winston Chat on career sites and automatic requisition closure
bullets: SmartRecruiters Winston Chat can now be embedded on SuccessFactors career sites via Career Site Builder, syncing job req data and reducing repetitive candidate inquiries.
Job requisitions now auto-close when an application moves to 'Hired' status, reducing reporting noise and improving time-to-fill accuracy.
OnChange business rules now trigger alerts when recruiters change candidate status, enabling compliance prompts and quality gates.
Career site receives full-width layout, improved mobile experience, and employer branding options.
Release goes live in production 15–16 May 2026; SAP deepening its SmartRecruiters co-sell motion rather than building ATS AI natively.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SAP choosing to bolt SmartRecruiters AI onto SuccessFactors rather than build natively validates Workday's unified-platform approach — emphasise that our AI lives in the same data model, not a separate vendor.

competitorNews.title: Greenhouse Real Talent™: AI candidate matching, fraud detection, and identity verification
bullets: Real Talent™ bundles AI-powered Talent Matching, fraud detection, spam blocklist, and identity verification into a single solution released in February 2026.
Targets the growing problem of fraudulent and bot-generated applications — directly competitive with Workday's own candidate fraud discussions.
Talent Matching provides ranked candidate recommendations against open roles, broadening Greenhouse's AI screening surface.
Spam blocklist and identity verification strengthen data quality at the top of the funnel before applications enter the pipeline.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Greenhouse closing the candidate fraud and AI screening gap; Workday should accelerate HiredScore fraud signal integration and surface it visibly in Recruiting workflows.
